title: Update LOBODA Jewelry logo to have a transparent background

requirements.text: Replace the existing logo assets at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png with transparent-background versions of the same designs. All Header, Footer, and other components currently referencing these files should continue to use the same filenames — no component code changes required unless background artifacts become visible against dark or light surfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: loboda-logo.png renders with a fully transparent background (no white, black, or colored fill behind the swan emblem and text).
loboda-logo-icon.png renders with a fully transparent background.
Both logos display correctly against the site's dark charcoal/black header and footer backgrounds without any visible background box or halo.
No layout or sizing regressions in Header or Footer components.

constraints: Keep the same filenames (loboda-logo.png and loboda-logo-icon.png) so no component references need to change.
Do not alter the visual design of the logos beyond removing the background.
nonGoals: Changes to Header, Footer, or any other component code unless strictly necessary to fix background artifact visibility.
Adding new logo variants beyond the two existing assets.

edits: Remove background and make fully transparent, preserving gold swan emblem and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly (loboda-logo.png > loboda-logo.dim_400x400.png)
Remove background and make fully transparent, preserving gold swan icon and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly (loboda-logo-icon.png > loboda-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png)
